probe.raw_output:
Change 1: Handler error handling (handler.go)
What changed: GetDashboard now checks the error from FetchAll, returns HTTP 500 on failure, and stops instead of encoding a nil/empty result.
Category: bugfix
Risk: low

Change 2: New FetchUserMetrics method (service.go)
What changed: Added FetchUserMetrics(ctx, userID) that loads user metrics from the repo and returns a UserMetrics struct.
Category: feature
Risk: medium

Change 3: FetchAll return type and error handling (service.go)
What changed: FetchAll now returns ([]DashboardItem, error) instead of interface{}, propagating errors.
Category: refactor
Risk: medium

Change 4: Cache read lock (cache.go)
What changed: Cache.Get uses RLock/RUnlock instead of Lock/Unlock for read-only access.
Category: performance
Risk: low
